_provenance.stage: Stage 6 — Synthesis (retroactive rebuild from Codex Stage 3)

revision_log: CORRECTED (Stage 3): MISLEADING — 'announced on 26 March 2026' → '26 March PMO speech said being fine-tuned; PSD circular followed 2 April; implementation 15 April'.
REMOVED (Stage 3): UNVERIFIED — 'bundled with Raya open-house cancellations and minister travel bans' (no joint official notice).
CORRECTED (Stage 3): INCORRECT — 'No implementation details, timelines or productivity metrics have been published' → published rules (15 April, 8 km threshold, SPOT-Me, KPI/output) since 14 April.
REMOVED (Stage 3): UNVERIFIED — Excluded frontline workers 'disproportionately female, rural, longest commuters' specific claim (lacked occupational data).

CORRECTED (Stage 3): MISLEADING — 'Senior Grade 41+ administrative officers gain flexibility' → eligibility framed by location + commute threshold; gender split presented for both top-management and Grade 41-54 cohorts.
CORRECTED (Stage 3): MISLEADING — '1.7M civil servants' specific number dropped → 'large by international comparisons; cross-country ratios difficult to compare per World Bank'.
CORRECTED (Stage 3): INCORRECT — 'Wage bill RM41B + RM23B pensions' → 'Budget 2026 RM109.4B emoluments + RM42.8B retirement charges'.
REMOVED (Stage 3): UNVERIFIED — 'COVID-era WFH failed when supervisors couldn't manage' (anecdotal).
REMOVED (Stage 3): UNVERIFIED — 'Digital infrastructure outside Putrajaya is patchy' (no broadband/uptime data).
CORRECTED (Stage 3): INCORRECT — 'Malaysia has published nothing' → '2 April PSD circular with KPIs and SPOT-Me'.
CORRECTED (Stage 3): INCORRECT — 'Melaka, Penang, Sarawak want to act but have no federal framework' → 'Penang declined for now; Sarawak has not issued a state directive'.
REMOVED (Stage 3): UNVERIFIED — 'Putrajaya guideline won't fit Kapit' (commentary).

REPHRASED (Stage 3): MISLEADING — Reframe 'civil service that couldn't sustain WFH during COVID' premise + view 'crisis response wearing reform's clothes' premise switched to verified facts (rules issued; enforcement is the test).
CLEARED legacyAudit (rebuild complete per CLAUDE.md Accuracy Standard).

PRESERVED (Stage 3 VERIFIED): RON95 quota cut context; Hormuz fuel-conservation trigger; frontline exclusion principle (nurses/teachers/police); UK hybrid attendance targets; Singapore flexible-work mandate.
